checks: PLP H1 compact typography restored on archive pages by adding higher-specificity rules for `h1.woocommerce-products-header__title.page-title` on `body.post-type-archive-product`, `body.tax-product_cat`, `body.tax-product_tag` to override the larger `--fs-2xl` rule coming from `05-plp-cards.css`.
Change targets the intended PLP surfaces (Shop archive + product category/tag archives) rather than global H1 styling.

PLP filter parity E2E stability improved by making category URL discovery resilient: when `PLP_CATEGORY_SLUG` is not set, the spec auto-discovers a category URL via `/sklep/` links and falls back safely.
gaps: No direct visual confirmation captured here that computed H1 font-size is compact in the browser on staging across Shop + category/tag (only code-level plausibility).
`tasks/pipeline-json/2026-03-26__protocol__verifier-critic-modes/` contains only `.gitkeep` (scaffold present, but no actual run JSON artifacts recorded there yet).
risks: Duplicate H1 sizing rule appears in both `assets/css/main.css` and `assets/css/parts/24-plp-table.css`; future edits could drift and reintroduce inconsistency.

`resolveCategoryUrl()` picks the first matching category link on `/sklep/`; if the first match is not representative (or the page has no such links), the test may still be flaky (though it has a fallback).
required_next_steps: Add a minimal pipeline-json run folder with the expected JSON filenames (even stubbed) for the current run, so the scaffold is exercised end-to-end.
Optionally de-duplicate the PLP H1 override into a single source of truth (either keep it only in the PLP part file or only in main.css) to reduce drift risk.
If you want this practical verdict upgraded to ‘visually confirmed’, capture a staging check: open Shop + one category/tag and confirm computed H1 font-size matches the clamp range.
